function.name: detect_anomalies
function.description: Detect statistical anomalies in layer data using z-score and IQR methods. Identifies outliers, extreme values, and unusual patterns in geospatial datasets.

layer_name.description: The name of the layer to analyze for anomalies (e.g., 'SWOT November 2024', 'ICESat-2 freeboard')

geographical_area.description: The geographical area to analyze (e.g., 'Beaufort Sea', 'Arctic Ocean', 'current view'). Defaults to current view if not specified.

method.description: The anomaly detection method to use. 'auto' uses both z-score and IQR methods.

threshold.description: The threshold for anomaly detection. For z-score method, this is the number of standard deviations (default 2.5).

time_start.description: Start time for temporal analysis in ISO format (e.g., '2024-11-01')

time_end.description: End time for temporal analysis in ISO format (e.g., '2024-11-30')

visualize.description: Whether to highlight anomalous regions on the map (default true)

ui.title: Detecting Anomalies
ui.details: Analyzing statistical outliers and extreme values in the dataset
